name: Stockland
analysis: SGP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 35% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.3200, stop A$3.8511, target A$5.1100 (1.68:1) — then trail it.
